enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Short Title and Commencement
1 These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 2 These Directions shall come into effect from the date of issue.
enriched_requirements.object: the date of issue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Applicability
3 These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Co-operative Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks
and Central Co-operative Banks, as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture
and Rural Development Act, 1981.
enriched_requirements.object: and Central Co-operative Banks, as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development Act, 1981

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Definitions
4 In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein
shall bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Defeasance period' means time taken to liquidate the investment in
securities on the basis of liquidity in the secondary market.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Defeasance period' means time taken to liquidate the investment in securities on the basis of liquidity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Embedded Options' means customers exercising their options
(premature closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances).
enriched_requirements.object: (premature closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
5 All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations
made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Responsibilities of the Board
6 The Board shall have an overall responsibility for risk management and shall
decide the risk management policy of a bank including Asset Liability
Management (ALM) Policy, and set limits for liquidity, interest rate, and equity
price risks.
enriched_requirements.object: for risk management and shall decide the risk management policy of a bank including Asset Liability Management (ALM) Po

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
7 The Management Committee of the Board or any other specific Committee
constituted by the Board shall oversee the implementation of the ALM system
and review its functioning periodically.
enriched_requirements.object: the ALM system and review its functioning periodically

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
8 The Board shall be responsible for providing adequate information to the
stakeholders.
enriched_requirements.object: adequate information to the stakeholders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Board approved policies, limits, and reviews
9 The Board / Management Committee shall approve internal prudential limits for
cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets of the structural
liquidity statement (SLS) for monitoring by a bank.
enriched_requirements.object: for cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets of the structural liquidity statement (SLS) for m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
10 The business and risk management strategy of the bank should ensure that the
bank operates within the limits / parameters set by the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: operates within the limits / parameters set by the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
11 The Board / Asset-Liability Management Committee (ALCO) of a bank shall
approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, and cut-loss
limits for the investments in the 'current category'.
enriched_requirements.object: holding / defeasance period, and cut-loss limits for the investments in the 'current category'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
12 The Board / Management Committee of a bank shall approve prudential limits
on individual gaps in Interest Rate Sensitivity (IRS).
enriched_requirements.object: individual gaps in Interest Rate Sensitivity (IRS)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The prudential limits shall
be based on the Total Assets, Earning Assets, or Equity.
enriched_requirements.object: Total Assets, Earning Assets, or Equity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board /
Management Committee of bank shall also approve a prudent level of Earnings
at Risk (EaR) or Net Interest Margin (NIM).
enriched_requirements.object: level of Earnings at Risk (EaR) or Net Interest Margin (NIM)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
13 The Board / ALCO of bank shall approve the estimates of behavioural pattern,
embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, etc., of various components of assets
and liabilities on the basis of past data / empirical studies for classification of
the same in the appropriate time buckets.
enriched_requirements.object: behavioural pattern, embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Introduction
14 A bank shall establish an ALM system that offers a comprehensive and
dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring, and managing liquidity, interest
rate, currency / foreign exchange, and equity price risks.
enriched_requirements.object: that offers a comprehensive and dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring, and managing liquidity, interest rate, currency /

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The ALM framework
shall be closely aligned with the bank's business strategy.
enriched_requirements.object: the bank's business strategy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
15 The bank shall use the ALM function to promote risk management discipline by
making informed business decisions that account for inherent risks.
enriched_requirements.object: to promote risk management discipline by making informed business decisions that account for inherent risks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
ALM
decisions shall be integrated, addressing asset-liability mix and maturity
structure simultaneously.
enriched_requirements.object: mix and maturity structure simultaneously

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
16 The ALM system shall be developed into a strategic tool for a bank's
management, clearly specifying the risk policies and tolerance limits.
enriched_requirements.object: strategic tool for a bank's management, clearly specifying the risk policies and tolerance limits
process encompasses the following: (1) Planning, directing and controlling the flow, mix, cost, and yield of the consolidated fund

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
18 A bank shall implement the ALM system on the following three pillars:
(1) ALM Information Systems;
enriched_requirements.object: on the following three pillars: (1) ALM Information Systems

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
ALM Information Systems
19 A bank shall align its ALM operations within the risk policies and tolerance limits
approved by the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: within the risk policies and tolerance limits approved by the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Top Management of the bank shall put in place a
robust Management Information System (MIS) to facilitate timely and accurate
data collection.
enriched_requirements.object: robust Management Information System (MIS) to facilitate timely and accurate data collection

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall evolve the MIS to better capture the risk
parameters, measurement of identified risks, and their management.
enriched_requirements.object: better capture the risk parameters, measurement of identified risks, and their management

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
20 A bank shall supplement its balance sheet, income and cash flow statements
with risk disclosures to promote efficient resource allocation, enforce financial
discipline, enhance transparency and reflect its true financial health.
enriched_requirements.object: income and cash flow statements with risk disclosures to promote efficient resource allocation, enforce financial discip

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
ALM Organization
21 A bank shall establish an ALCO comprising its Top Management, including the
CEO.
enriched_requirements.object: its Top Management, including the CEO

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The ALCO shall meet regularly, ensure compliance with Board-approved
limits, and align asset-liability strategies with budget and risk objectives.
enriched_requirements.object: with Board-approved limits, and align asset-liability strategies with budget and risk objectives

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
22 The size (number of members) of ALCO shall depend on the size of the bank's
business mix and organisational complexity.
enriched_requirements.object: of the bank's business mix and organisational complexity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The CEO / MD or General
Manager shall head the ALCO, and Heads of Investment, Credit and Strategy,
Resources Management, Treasury and Risk Management can be members of
the ALCO, along with other members, as deemed suitable.
enriched_requirements.object: Heads of Investment, Credit and Strategy, Resources Management, Treasury and Risk Management can be members of the ALCO, along with

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank, at its discretion, may have Sub-Committees and
Support Groups.
enriched_requirements.object: Groups

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
23 The ALM Support Group consisting of operating staff shall be responsible for
analysing, monitoring, and reporting the risk profiles to the ALCO.
enriched_requirements.object: monitoring, and reporting the risk profiles to the ALCO

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The staff
shall also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various
possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and
recommend the action needed to adhere to prescribed internal limits.
enriched_requirements.object: showing the effects of various possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
24 The ALCO shall be responsible for balance sheet planning from risk-return
perspective, including the strategic management of interest rate and liquidity
risks.
enriched_requirements.object: sheet planning from risk-return perspective, including the strategic management of interest rate and liquidity risks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall define the roles and responsibilities of its ALCO, as also the
decisions to be taken by it.
enriched_requirements.object: responsibilities of its ALCO, as also the decisions to be taken by it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank's business and risk management strategy
shall ensure that it operates within the limits / parameters set by the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: within the limits / parameters set by the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
25 The agenda / typical business of ALCO shall include the following:
<image>
(1) Review of progress in implementation of the decisions made in the
previous meetings;
enriched_requirements.object: (1) Review of progress in implementation of the decisions made in the previous meetings

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall
incorporate such other issues which, in its opinion, need to be discussed in the
Committee based on the local conditions.
enriched_requirements.object: which, in its opinion, need to be discussed in the Committee based on the local conditions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall take a view on whether
all the agenda items are required to be discussed in all the meetings, and
agenda can be fixed for each meeting depending upon the emergent needs
and priority.
enriched_requirements.object: whether all the agenda items are required to be discussed in all the meetings, and agenda can be fixed for each meeting depending upon

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
27 A bank shall decide the frequency for holding its ALCO meetings, as also take
steps for capacity building of the Nodal Officer and other officers involved in
ALM functions.
enriched_requirements.object: holding its ALCO meetings, as also take steps for capacity building of the Nodal Officer and other officers involved in ALM f

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
ALM Process
28 The bank shall ensure that the ALM process covers the following functional
areas with focus on liquidity and interest rate risks:
(1) Liquidity risk management;
enriched_requirements.object: process covers the following functional areas with focus on liquidity and interest rate risks: (1) Liquidity risk management

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Introduction
29 A bank's management shall measure its liquidity position on an ongoing basis,
as also evaluate liquidity requirements under different assumptions by putting in
place a system for ascertaining its cash flow mismatches periodically.
enriched_requirements.object: on an ongoing basis, as also evaluate liquidity requirements under different assumptions by putting in place a system f

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Maturity / Cash flow mismatches 30 A bank shall use maturity ladder tool to measure and manage net funding
requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: to measure and manage net funding requirements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall use the Structural Liquidity Statement (SLS) at
enriched_requirements.object: Statement (SLS) at

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
31 A bank shall use the Maturity Profile as given in Annex-IV for measuring the
future cash flows in different time buckets.
enriched_requirements.object: as given in Annex-IV for measuring the future cash flows in different time buckets
(1) 1 to 14 days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
32 The SLS shall place all cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder
according to the expected timing of cash flows.
enriched_requirements.object: and outflows in the maturity ladder according to the expected timing of cash flows

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A maturing liability shall be a
cash outflow, while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow.
enriched_requirements.object: while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make
appropriate assumptions according to its asset-liability profile while determining
the likely cash inflows and outflows.
enriched_requirements.object: to its asset-liability profile while determining the likely cash inflows and outflows

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also take into account all
relevant factors, based on its asset-liability base, and nature of business while
determining the tolerance levels.
enriched_requirements.object: all relevant factors, based on its asset-liability base, and nature of business while determining the tolerance levels

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
33 A bank shall primarily focus on the short-term mismatches (1-14 days and 15-
28 days).
enriched_requirements.object: short-term mismatches (1-14 days and 15- 28 days)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The mismatches (negative gap) in the 1-14 days and 15-28 days
buckets shall not exceed 20 per cent of the cash outflows in the respective time
buckets.
enriched_requirements.object: of the cash outflows in the respective time buckets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
34 A bank shall monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time
buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the Board /
Management Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the Board /

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
35 A bank's investment in SLR securities and other investments in permanent
category shall be shown under respective maturity buckets, corresponding to
the residual maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
36 A bank maintaining securities in the 'current' category, distinct from investments
made for complying with the Statutory Reserve requirements and for retaining
relationship with customers, shall be permitted to place such trading securities
into 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days buckets on the basis of the
defeasance periods, provided following conditions are met:
(1) Composition and value are clearly defined;
enriched_requirements.object: such trading securities into 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days buckets on the basis of the defeasance periods

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
37 The Board / ALCO of a bank shall approve the volume, composition, holding /
defeasance period and cut-loss limits of the 'current category' investments.
enriched_requirements.object: holding / defeasance period and cut-loss limits of the 'current category' investments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A
copy of the approved policy note shall be forwarded to the Department of
Supervision, NABARD, and Financial Inclusion and Development Department
(FIDD), RBI under advice to the respective Regional Office.
enriched_requirements.object: Department of Supervision, NABARD, and Financial Inclusion and Development Department (FIDD), RBI under advice to the respective R

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Dynamic Liquidity Assessment
38 A bank shall estimate its short-term liquidity profiles on the basis of business
projections and other commitments for planning purposes, to monitor its short-
term liquidity on a dynamic basis over a time horizon spanning from 1-90 days,
as per format of Statement of Dynamic Liquidity provided in Annex-II.
enriched_requirements.object: profiles on the basis of business projections and other commitments for planning purposes, to monitor its short- ter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Scheduled StCB
39 A Scheduled State Cooperative Bank (StCB) which is Core Banking Solution
(CBS) enabled and maintains a Capital to Risk-weighted Assets Ratio (CRAR)
<image>
of at least 9 per cent shall be eligible to access the Liquidity Adjustment Facility
(LAF) and the Marginal Standing Facility (MSF).
enriched_requirements.object: the Liquidity Adjustment Facility (LAF) and the Marginal Standing Facility (MSF)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
41 The Department of Regulation (DoR) shall communicate to the FMOD, the list
of Scheduled StCBs eligible to participate in LAF and MSF ("Positive List") and
the list of Scheduled StCBs found ineligible ("Negative List").
enriched_requirements.object: the list of Scheduled StCBs eligible to participate in LAF and MSF ("Positive List") and the list of Scheduled StCBs found in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
42 The eligibility status of a Scheduled StCB in the Positive List shall be reviewed
on an ongoing basis to ensure that the CRAR requirement is being complied
with.
enriched_requirements.object: ongoing basis to ensure that the CRAR requirement is being complied with

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall follow the Traditional Gap Analysis to
measure the Interest Rate Risk.
enriched_requirements.object: Analysis to measure the Interest Rate Risk

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Traditional Gap Analysis
45 The Gap or Mismatch risk shall be measured by calculating Gaps over different
time intervals as at a given date, by preparing the Interest Rate Sensitivity
Statement as per format given in Annex-III.
enriched_requirements.object: Gaps over different time intervals as at a given date, by preparing the Interest Rate Sensitivity Statement as per format g

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
46 'Gap analysis' means measurement of 'Gap', i.e., mismatches between rate
sensitive liabilities (RSL) and rate sensitive assets (including off-balance sheet
positions) through a Gap Report generated by grouping rate sensitive liabilities,
assets and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual
maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier.

enriched_requirements.object: (1) Segregations of assets and liabilities into various time buckets based on residual maturity or next repricing period,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest Rate Sensitivity Statement
48 The rate sensitive liabilities, assets, and off-balance sheet positions shall be
grouped into time buckets based on residual maturity or next repricing period,
whichever is earlier to prepare a gap report.
enriched_requirements.object: buckets based on residual maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier to prepare a gap report

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Gaps shall be identified in the
following time buckets.
enriched_requirements.object: following time buckets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
49 The various items of rate sensitive assets (RSA), rate sensitive liabilities (RSL)
and OBS items shall be classified as explained in Annex-V.
enriched_requirements.object: in Annex-V

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
51 A bank shall set prudential limits on individual Gaps with the approval of the
Board / Management Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: individual Gaps with the approval of the Board / Management Committee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The prudential limits shall be based on the
Total Assets, Earning Assets, or Equity.
enriched_requirements.object: Total Assets, Earning Assets, or Equity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also work out Earnings at
Risk (EaR), or Net Interest Margin (NIM), based on its views on interest rate
movements and fix a prudent level with the approval of the Board /
Management Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: at Risk (EaR), or Net Interest Margin (NIM), based on its views on interest rate movements and fix a prudent level with the app

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Behavioural Patterns
52 Notwithstanding guidance provided in Annex-IV and Annex-V, a bank which is
better equipped to reasonably estimate the behavioural pattern, embedded
options, rolls-in and rolls-out, etc., of various components of assets and
liabilities on the basis of past data / empirical studies shall classify the same in
the appropriate time buckets, subject to approval from the ALCO / Board.
enriched_requirements.object: the appropriate time buckets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A
copy of the note approved by the ALCO / Board shall be sent to the Department
of Supervision, NABARD and FIDD, RBI under advice to the respective
Regional Office.
enriched_requirements.object: Department of Supervision, NABARD and FIDD, RBI under advice to the respective Regional Office

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Embedded Options
53 A bank shall evolve suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and
behavioral analysis to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and
off-balance sheet items to the changes in market variables and estimate the
embedded options.
enriched_requirements.object: by empirical studies and behavioral analysis to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and off-bal

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Transfer Price Mechanism
54 A bank shall follow a well-defined 'transfer pricing system' which provides a
rational framework for pricing of assets and liabilities.
enriched_requirements.object: pricing system' which provides a rational framework for pricing of assets and liabilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Financial Reporting and Role of Auditors
55 The Board shall ensure that adequate financial information is disclosed to
stakeholders in order to promote market discipline.
enriched_requirements.object: information is disclosed to stakeholders in order to promote market discipline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The authenticity of financial
<image>
statements shall be certified by the auditors, whose independence shall be
ensured by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: auditors, whose independence shall be ensured by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The auditors shall exhibit the highest standards of
integrity in the conduct of their responsibilities.
enriched_requirements.object: of integrity in the conduct of their responsibilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Chapter VII - Monitoring and Reporting
56 A bank may submit the two ALM returns, viz., Structural Liquidity Statement
(SLS) and Interest Rate Sensitivity (IRS) Statement at quarterly intervals.
enriched_requirements.object: returns, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a bank shall
refer to relevant supervisory guidelines from NABARD for submission timelines
for all ALM returns.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines from NABARD for submission timelines for all ALM returns

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed shall continue to
remain repealed.

58 Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Application of other laws not barred
59 The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interpretations
60 For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

Outflows
Capital, Reserves and Surplus Over 5 years bucket
Demand Deposits (Current and Savings Bank Deposits)
Savings Bank and Current Deposits may be classified into volatile and core portions.
enriched_requirements.object: and core portions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: This portion may be treated as volatile.
While volatile portion can be placed in the first time bucket, i.e., 1-14 days, the core portion may be placed in over 1- 3 years time bucket.
enriched_requirements.object: 1- 3 years time bucket

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: However, the wholesale deposits (deposits over Rs.15 lakhs and inter-bank deposits) should be shown under respective residual time buckets.
enriched_requirements.object: residual time buckets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Inter-office Adjustments
The net credit balance may be shown in 1-14 days time bucket.
enriched_requirements.object: days time bucket

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: guarantee fee received in advance, etc.) may be placed in over 5 years time buckets.
enriched_requirements.object: 5 years time buckets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Balances with RBI / Public Sector Banks for CRR/ SLR purpose
While the excess balance over the required CRR / SLR may be shown under 1-14 days time buckets, the Statutory Balances may be distributed amongst various time buckets corresponding to the maturity profile of DTL with a time-lag of 28 days.
enriched_requirements.object: days time buckets, the Statutory Balances may be distributed amongst various time buckets corresponding to the maturity profile of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Current Account Non-withdrawable portion on account of stipulations of minimum balances may be shown under over 1-3 years time bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under 1-14 days time bucket.
enriched_requirements.object: 1-3 years time bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under 1-14 days time bucket

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investments classified as NPAs should be shown under over 3-5 years time buckets (sub-standard) or over 5 years time
bucket (doubtful).
enriched_requirements.object: 3-5 years time buckets (sub-standard) or over 5 years time bucket (doubtful)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Cash Credit / Overdraft (including TOD) and Demand Loan Component of Working Capital
Bank should undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified.
enriched_requirements.object: behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: While the volatile portion could be shown in the near-term maturity time buckets, the core portion may be shown under over 1-3 year time bucket.
enriched_requirements.object: 1-3 year time bucket

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Term Loans Interim cash flows (instalments) should be shown under respective maturity time buckets.
enriched_requirements.object: maturity time buckets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Doubtful and Loss Over 5 years time bucket
Fixed Assets Over 5 years time bucket
Other Assets
The net debit balance may be shown in 1-14 days time bucket.
enriched_requirements.object: days time bucket

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Intangible assets and assets not representing cash receivables may be shown in over 5 years time bucket.
enriched_requirements.object: 5 years time bucket

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Banks should undertake a study of the behavioural and seasonal pattern of potential availments in the accounts and the amounts so arrived at may be shown under relevant residual maturity time buckets within 12 months.
enriched_requirements.object: residual maturity time buckets within 12 months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
1-14 days time bucket
Letters of Credit / Guarantees devolvement (outflow)
Based on past history, these should be distributed across time buckets.
enriched_requirements.object: buckets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Liability on account of event cash flows, i.e., short fall in CRR / SLR balance on reporting Fridays, wage settlement, capital
expenditure, etc., which are known to the banks and any other contingency may be shown under respective maturity
buckets.
enriched_requirements.object: maturity buckets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: All overdue liabilities should be placed in the 1-14 days time bucket.
enriched_requirements.object: 1-14 days time bucket

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest and instalments from advances and investments, which are overdue for less than one month may be placed in over
3-6 months time bucket.
enriched_requirements.object: 3-6 months time bucket

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, interest and instalments due (before classification as NPAs) may be placed in over 6-12
months time bucket if the earlier receivables remain uncollected.
enriched_requirements.object: 6-12 months time bucket if the earlier receivables remain uncollected

conditions: In case the negative gap exceeds the prudential limit of 20% of outflows
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Financing of Gap:
In case the negative gap exceeds the prudential limit of 20% of outflows, (1-14 days and 15-28 days time buckets) the bank shall
show by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits.
enriched_requirements.object: a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: This should be included in over 3-6 months time bucket.
enriched_requirements.object: 3-6 months time bucket

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The non-interest-paying portion may be shown in non-sensitive bucket.
enriched_requirements.object: bucket
